CustomField.description: Query Locator Rows usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.formula: IF(LimitsQueryLocatorRowsMax__c = 0, "✅ N/A", IF(LimitsQueryLocatorRowsConsumed__c / LimitsQueryLocatorRowsMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.QueryLocatorRows.TransactionRedPercent__c / 100, "⛔", IF(LimitsQueryLocatorRowsConsumed__c / LimitsQueryLocatorRowsMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.QueryLocatorRows.TransactionAmberPercent__c / 100, "⚠️", "✅") ) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(LimitsQueryLocatorRowsConsumed__c / LimitsQueryLocatorRowsMax__c * 100, 1)) & "% (" & TEXT(LimitsQueryLocatorRowsConsumed__c) & " / " & TEXT(LimitsQueryLocatorRowsMax__c) & ")" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Query Locator Rows usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.label: Query Locator Rows
